work_item.description: Routing table: the adr_review gate routes to codex model o4-mini, which is rejected by codex CLI under a ChatGPT account ("The 'o4-mini' model is not supported when using Codex with a ChatGPT account"). Update the default routing table to a supported model (codex config default is gpt-5.5) or make the codex model configurable per install. Observed 2026-06-12 during the first ADR gate review.
